info.name: Madhuban Backend API
info.description:
Postman collection for Madhuban role-based task backend.

**Supervisor:** Auth → Login (Supervisor), then Supervisor → Dashboard / Attendance. `GET /api/supervisor/dashboard` aggregates KPIs, zone health, urgent tasks, recent activity (supervisor JWT). `GET/POST /api/supervisor/attendance` mirrors staff (selfie + GPS on check-in).

Staff attendance: Staff → Attendance — GET status, POST check-in (selfie + GPS) and check-out (GPS) as multipart/form-data. Requires AWS S3 env for check-in uploads.

Staff task photos: use Staff → Task photos (multipart). Flow: GET Tasks → POST before-photo → POST after-photo (creates TaskApproval for supervisor). Presigned upload and start/complete endpoints are not used.

request.description: Compact list per property: id, name, imageUrl, timestamps, departmentCount, floorCount, zoneCount.
Full tree: departments, floors, and floorZones (use for admin / sync).
Single property with departments, floors, and floorZones.
Floors for a property (PropertyFloor rows). Use `id` as `propertyFloorId` for zones.
Zones (PropertyFloorZone) for one floor. `id` here is the **zoneId** for POST /api/tasks.
JSON body. Creates the property and nested floors/zones in one transaction. For multipart + optional image file, use **Properties - Create (form-data)**. `name` is an alias for `propertyName`.

formdata.description: Optional: jpeg, png, gif, webp (max 5MB). Choose file in Postman.

request.description: Same as JSON create but uses multipart/form-data. Do not set Content-Type manually (Postman adds boundary). Response includes `imageUrl` path under `/uploads/properties/...` when a file is sent.
Deletes the property. Cascades to departments, floors, and zones (per schema).

Creates a user. Provide `roleId` (preferred) or `role` (fallback). Note: `phone`, `status`, `department` are accepted but not stored in DB (current schema). For role=supervisor you can optionally pass `managerId`. For role=staff you can optionally pass `supervisorId`.
Creates a manager (roleId=2). Backend rejects managerId/supervisorId for this role.
Creates a supervisor (roleId=3). `managerId` is required.
Creates a staff user (roleId=4). `supervisorId` is required (backend also accepts managerId as alias).

item.name: Admin
item.description: Requires `Auth - Login (Admin)` (sets `{{token}}`). Endpoint: `GET /api/admin/dashboard` (optional `date`, optional `propertyId`). Returns KPI counts + attendance summary. If `propertyId` is provided, attendance is inferred from staff who have tasks in that property for the day.

request.description: Admin JWT. Optional query params: `date` (YYYY-MM-DD), `propertyId` (number).
Admin JWT. Uses `taskDate` and `propertyId` from environment.

item.name: Staff
item.description:
Requires `Auth - Login (Staff)` (sets `{{token}}`). Optional env: `taskDate`, `dailyTaskId`, `beforePhotoPath`, `afterPhotoPath`, `attendanceSelfiePath`, `attendanceLat`, `attendanceLng` for local file paths / sample coordinates.

Endpoints: `GET /api/staff/dashboard`, `GET /api/staff/attendance`, `POST /api/staff/attendance` (check-in / check-out), `GET /api/staff/tasks`, `POST/.../before-photo`, `POST/.../after-photo` (creates supervisor approval).

request.description: Requires `Auth - Login (Staff)` to set `{{token}}`.
Optional query: `date` (YYYY-MM-DD). IST day normalization.

item.name: Attendance
item.description: `GET /api/staff/attendance` — optional `date` (YYYY-MM-DD), IST calendar day. `POST /api/staff/attendance` — multipart: `action` check_in | check_out, `latitude`, `longitude`; check-in also requires `selfie` (jpeg/png). Set `attendanceSelfiePath` in environment to a local image path for check-in.

request.description: Returns `phase`: NOT_CHECKED_IN | ACTIVE | COMPLETED, check-in/out times, GPS, `shift` (MORNING | EVENING | NIGHT).
Same as today but for `taskDate` (YYYY-MM-DD).

formdata.description: image/jpeg or image/png. Set attendanceSelfiePath in environment.

request.description: 409 if already checked in today. Uploads selfie to S3; sets status PRESENT.
400 if not checked in; 409 if already checked out.

item.name: Task photos
item.description: `POST /api/staff/tasks/:dailyTaskId/before-photo` and `.../after-photo`. Body: multipart/form-data, field `photo` (jpeg/png). After-photo creates `TaskApproval` for the staff supervisor.

request.description: Set `dailyTaskId` from task list or env. Set `beforePhotoPath` in environment to a local image file path.
Requires before-photo first. Creates pending approval for supervisor.

item.name: Reports
item.description: `GET /api/staff/report` — monthly priority counts, zone completion %, attendance grid/streaks, last 5 checker feedback.

request.description: Requires staff JWT. Set `reportYear` / `reportMonth` in environment (e.g. 2026, 4 for April).

item.name: Supervisor
item.description:
Requires `Auth - Login (Supervisor)` (sets `{{token}}`). Reuses `{{taskDate}}`, `{{attendanceLat}}`, `{{attendanceLng}}`, `{{attendanceSelfiePath}}` like Staff attendance.

Endpoints: `GET /api/supervisor/profile`, `GET /api/supervisor/dashboard` (optional `date`), `GET/POST /api/supervisor/attendance`, `GET /api/supervisor/reviews` (list), `GET /api/supervisor/reviews/:dailyTaskId` (detail), `POST /api/supervisor/reviews/:dailyTaskId/decision` (approve/send_back), `GET /api/supervisor/reports/shift` (Reports → Shift analytics).

request.description: Supervisor JWT. Returns profile fields for the mobile Profile screen (name/initials/email/role, active status from today attendance, property label from today supervised tasks, reporting manager, appVersion).
Supervisor JWT. KPIs (needsReview, approved, rejected), completion %, urgentTasks, zones, recentActivity, badges, shiftInProgress (from attendance for that IST day).
Same as today with optional `date` (YYYY-MM-DD), IST calendar day.

item.name: Attendance
item.description: `GET /api/supervisor/attendance` — optional `date` (YYYY-MM-DD). `POST` — multipart: `action` check_in | check_out, `latitude`, `longitude`; check-in requires `selfie` (jpeg/png). Same `StaffAttendance` row keyed by supervisor user id.

request.description: Returns `phase`: NOT_CHECKED_IN | ACTIVE | COMPLETED, check-in/out times, GPS, `shift`.
Attendance for `taskDate` (YYYY-MM-DD).
409 if already checked in today. Requires S3 for selfie upload.
400 if not checked in; 409 if already checked out.

item.name: Reports
item.description: Supervisor Reports → Shift analytics. Uses IST day via `date` (YYYY-MM-DD).

request.description: Returns Overview, Zone, Function, Employee datasets in one payload.

item.name: GET Supervisor - Shift Report Employee Detail

request.description: Returns recent shift logs for one staff member (must belong to supervisor).

item.name: Reviews
item.description: Supervisor review flow for staff submitted tasks (TaskApproval). `status`: needs_review | sent_back | approved | all. `q` searches task title / zone / staff name. `priority`: CRITICAL | HIGH.

request.description: List review cards for approvals pending supervisor decision.
Modal payload (task meta, maker, photos, approval status). Set `dailyTaskId` from Staff after-photo flow.

item.name: Manager
item.description: Requires `Auth - Login (Manager)` (sets `{{token}}`). Endpoint: `GET /api/manager/dashboard` (optional `date`). Aggregates KPIs, zone health, urgent tasks, recent activity across all supervisors/staff under the manager.

request.description: Manager JWT. Same response shape as supervisor dashboard + `date` + `shiftInProgress`.
Optional `date` (YYYY-MM-DD). IST calendar day normalization.
Manager JWT. Mirrors supervisor profile shape (profile + badges + account).

item.name: Attendance
item.description: `GET /api/manager/attendance` — optional `date` (YYYY-MM-DD). `POST` — multipart: `action` check_in | check_out, `latitude`, `longitude`; check-in requires `selfie` (jpeg/png). Same `StaffAttendance` row keyed by manager user id.

request.description: Returns `phase`: NOT_CHECKED_IN | ACTIVE | COMPLETED, check-in/out times, GPS, `shift`.
Attendance for `taskDate` (YYYY-MM-DD).
409 if already checked in today. Requires S3 for selfie upload.
400 if not checked in; 409 if already checked out.

item.name: Tasks
item.description: List all daily tasks for a specific supervisor's team (staff under that supervisor). Requires manager JWT and `supervisorId` query param.

request.description: Optional filters: `filter` all|critical|high|done. Pagination: `page`, `limit` (max 100). Returns same shape as staff tasks list + `supervisorId`.

item.name: Reports
item.description: Manager Reports → Shift analytics (aggregated across all supervisors/staff under the manager). Uses IST day via `date` (YYYY-MM-DD).

request.description: Returns Overview, Zone, Function, Employee datasets and escalations in one payload.

item.name: GET Manager - Shift Report Employee Detail

request.description: Returns shift logs for one staff member (must belong to manager org). Uses existing `{{staffId}}` environment variable.

item.name: Daily Staff Tasks - Get By Date
